rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH BARIBEAU VS. HARRY C. THOMAS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiffs' Inspection Demand, Set One
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 6, 2018, line 2. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH BARIBEAU's Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiffs' Inspection Demand, Set One. Transferred to department 301 to be heard on June 25, 2018 at 9:00 a.m.. Parties must provide courtesy copies of all papers for all motions to Dept. 301 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: PRIYA SANGER ET AL VS. AHE AHN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reinstate Doe Defendants
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 6, 2018, line 3. PLAINTIFF PRIYA SANGER, MICHAEL SANGER's Motion To Reinstate Doe Defendants. GRANTED per CCP § 473(a)(1). Statute of limitations is an affirmative defense and Defendant lacks standing to assert it. = (501/CFH)
